channel.title: Amazon Super | Toys on LEGO barato - Cheap - Angebote - Cadeaux
channel.description: Recent content in Amazon Super | Toys on LEGO barato - Cheap - Angebote - Cadeaux

item.title: LEGO 41808 DOTS Hogwarts Accessories Pack Harry Potter Themed Jewellery Making Kit with Bracelet 2 Bag Tags and Stich-on Patch DIY Craft Toy Set for Kids
item.description: You’ve got LEGO 41808 DOTS Hogwarts Accessories Pack Harry Potter Themed Jewellery Making Kit with Bracelet 2 Bag Tags and Stich-on Patch DIY Craft Toy Set for Kids at the following link: ℹ️: Kids can create their own Harry Potter toy accessories with this LEGO DOTS Hogwarts Accessories pack featuring 4 canvasses and lots of tiles A toy craft set that lets kids express themselves while creating designs to show their love for Harry Potter or their favourite Hogwarts House Ccontains over 225 tiles in different shapes and colours, with charms, charm holders and 10 randomly decorated tiles (out of 16 designs) Boost your little ones fun even further by combining this set with any of the other LEGO DOTS Harry Potter sets (41809, 41811, sold separately) 4 LEGO DOTS canvasses are included: a double-row bracelet, stitch-on patch, bag tag, Harry Potter lightning bolt scar bag tag, keyring and a key 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO 71404 Super Mario Goomba’s Shoe Expansion Set Buildable Toy Game with Goomba Figure Gifts for Kids Boys Girls 6 Plus Year Old Collectible Toys
item.description: You’ve got LEGO 71404 Super Mario Goomba’s Shoe Expansion Set Buildable Toy Game with Goomba Figure Gifts for Kids Boys Girls 6 Plus Year Old Collectible Toys at the following link: ℹ️: Collectible LEGO Super Mario building toys are designed for solo play or fun with family and friends, offering endless fun creating levels LEGO Super Mario expansion sets make great gifts for kids who own a LEGO Super Mario Starter Course 71360/71387/71403, which is required for play Kids can place the Super Mario Goomba figure inside the brick-built shoe, just like in the video games, and add to the levels they create Kids can help LEGO Mario, LEGO Luigi or LEGO Peach (figures not included) swipe the shoe to jump around and perform flips to win digital coins This LEGO Super Mario Goombas Shoe Expansion Set adds hopping, stomping, flipping fun to LEGO Mario, Luigi or Peach Starter Courses (not included) 🛒 Check the deal!

item.title: LEGO 71777 NINJAGO Kai s Dragon Power Spinjitzu Flip Toy Collectible Set for Kids Aged 6 plus to Perform Tricks with Kai Minifigure Small Gift Idea for Ninja Fans
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO 71777 NINJAGO Kai s Dragon Power Spinjitzu Flip Toy Collectible Set for Kids Aged 6 plus to Perform Tricks with Kai Minifigure Small Gift Idea for Ninja Fans here: ℹ️: Ninja fans can help train their hero to do backflips with this LEGO NINJAGO Kai’s Dragon Power Spinjitzu flip toy for kids aged 6 plus years old Collect other NINJAGO interactive action toys: Nya’s Dragon Power Spinjitzu Drift (71778) and Lloyd’s Dragon Power Spinjitzu Spin (71779) Kids can place the Dragon Power Kai NINJAGO minifigure inside the spinner, hit one of its arms and watch as he perfroms tricks and does a backflip The collectible toy also features a flaming holder with a golden dragon energy core element which Kai must win, and 2 flame obstacle elements The ninja toy playset comes with a Dragon Power NINJAGO Kai minifigure, plus an Imperium Droid figure that can tilt side to side when hit 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO 76253 Marvel Guardians of the Galaxy Headquarters Volume 3 Set with Groot and Star-Lord Minifigures Super Hero Building Toy for Kids Girls and Boys 7 and up
item.description: You’ve got LEGO 76253 Marvel Guardians of the Galaxy Headquarters Volume 3 Set with Groot and Star-Lord Minifigures Super Hero Building Toy for Kids Girls and Boys 7 and up at the following link: ℹ️: This LEGO Marvel buildable toy features the Guardians of the Galaxy Headquarters for kids to recreate action from Guardians of the Galaxy Volume 3 Includes 2 iconic characters; Groot and Star-Lord LEGO Marvel minifigures with their tools and weapons for kids to relive scenes from the movie A perfect Marvel gift idea for fans of Guardians of the Galaxy Volume 3, a toy to celebrate a special day or any time treat for kids aged 7+ Kids can change the setup of this Marvel building toy, interact with the super heroes to recreate favourite moments or play out their own adventure The LEGO Marvel set comes with tools and accessories inside the base, and a table where the Marvel super heroes can plan their next mission 🛒 Check the deal!
